title: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

options.title: Approach
options.requires: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

notes:
The Approach option enchants a single Attack card from your deck with Corrupted, which increases its damage by [blue]50%[/blue] but costs [blue]2[/blue] HP each time it's played. If you have no Attack cards that can be enchanted, this option is locked.

The Kill with Fire option transforms one card in your deck into a random card.

After either choice, the polyp either latches onto you and disappears mysteriously, or burns away to ashes.
